div.h3: Technical Specification: Per-Thread Slot Alignment & Isolation

g.text: CPU L1/L2 Cache Distribution (False Sharing Prevention)

ul.li: ⬛ Padding: Hardware-specific gap to satisfy MESI protocol

g.text: Design Goal: Eliminate 'Request For Ownership' (RFO) traffic between cores during hazard pointer updates.
Each HazardThreadSlot occupies exactly one cache line
